page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: System Configuration & API Access Management
page.configWarning: The following required configurations are incomplete:

agent.title: ArcReel Agent
agent.subtitle: Powered by Claude Agent SDK, driving conversational AI assistant and automated workflows
agent.configNote: Configuration is compatible with Claude Code environment variable naming, and can use the Claude Code-compatible Coding Plan API.

credentials.title: API Credentials
credentials.description: Anthropic API key is required for the agent to run
credentials.baseUrlEnvHint: Corresponds to ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, leave empty to use official default

model.title: Model Configuration
model.description: Specify the Claude model used by the agent. Leave empty to use Claude Agent SDK defaults.
model.defaultModelEnvHint: Corresponds to ANTHROPIC_MODEL, overrides default model
model.advancedRoutingHint: Claude Agent SDK supports routing to different models by capability tier. Leave empty to use the default model above for all.
model.subagentHint: Model used during parallel subagent execution

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.cleanupDelayHint: Wait this long after a session ends before releasing resources; the session will auto-restore on next conversation
advanced.maxSessionsHint: Maximum number of active agent sessions; oldest unused sessions are released when exceeded (released sessions are persisted and restored on next conversation)

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Used for external services like OpenClaw to access ArcReel API via Bearer Token

empty.title: No API Keys yet
empty.hint: Click "New Key" to create your first one

createModal.warningTitle: Please copy and save this API Key immediately. For security reasons, the full key
createModal.warningOnce: is only shown once at creation time
createModal.warningEnd: , and cannot be viewed again after closing.
createModal.expiresHint: Default 30 days; leave empty for no expiry
createModal.onlyOnceWarning: Please copy and save this API Key immediately. For security, the full key is only shown once at creation time and cannot be viewed again after closing.
createModal.name: Name

deleteModal.title: Revoke API Key
deleteModal.description: This will permanently revoke {{prefix}}… ({{name}}). Services using this key will immediately lose access, and this action cannot be undone.
deleteModal.descriptionEnd: Services using this key will immediately lose access, and this action cannot be undone.

apiKeys.description: Used by external services like OpenClaw to access the ArcReel API via Bearer Token
apiKeys.noKeysHint: Click "New Key" to create your first one

detail.keySet: Set (leave empty to keep existing value)

form.apiKeyPlaceholderEdit: Leave empty to keep existing key
form.emptyHint: Click "Fetch Model List" to auto-discover, or
form.validationBaseUrlRequired: Please enter a Base URL first
form.validationApiKeyRequired: Please enter an API Key first
form.validationModels: At least one model must be enabled
form.validationModelId: Enabled models must have a model_id

media.title: Model Selection
media.subtitle: Set the global default generation models; can be overridden per project
media.textModelHint: Configure text models by task type; leave empty for auto-selection
media.noVideoProviders: No video providers available. Please configure API keys in the Providers page first.
media.noImageProviders: No image providers available. Please configure API keys in the Providers page first.
media.noTextProviders: No text providers available. Please configure API keys in the Providers page first.

usage.title: Usage Stats
usage.subtitle: View API call statistics for each provider

project.title: Project Settings
project.modelConfigHint: Select generation models for this project; leave empty to follow global defaults
project.textModelHint: Override by task type; leave empty to follow global defaults
project.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
project.aspectRatioChanged: Existing storyboards/videos remain at the original ratio; consider regenerating
project.generationModeHint: Grid mode generates per paragraph group in one pass with chained first/last frames for more consistent style
project.defaultDurationHint: Default video duration for new storyboards; "Auto" lets AI decide based on content

credentials.title: Key Management
credentials.name: Name
credentials.apiKeyKeepExisting: API Key (leave empty to keep existing)

projectSettings.title: Project Settings
projectSettings.modelConfigDesc: Choose generation models for this project. Leave empty to follow global defaults
projectSettings.aspectRatioWarning: Existing storyboards/videos retain their original ratio. Consider regenerating
projectSettings.generationModeDesc: Grid mode generates per paragraph group with first/last frame chaining for more consistent style
projectSettings.defaultDurationDesc: Default video duration for new segments. "Auto" lets AI decide based on content
projectSettings.textModelDesc: Override by task type. Leave empty to follow global defaults
projectSettings.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

openClaw.title: OpenClaw Integration Guide
openClaw.subtitle: Connect ArcReel with OpenClaw AI Agent
openClaw.systemPrompt: Learn from {{url}} then follow the skill to understand how to create videos with ArcReel
openClaw.step01Title: Send the above prompt to your OpenClaw
openClaw.step01Desc: Copy the prompt and paste it to OpenClaw
openClaw.step02Title: OpenClaw learns capabilities from Skill docs
openClaw.step02Desc: OpenClaw will automatically read the ArcReel Skill document to learn all available tools and API usage
openClaw.step03Title: OpenClaw interacts with ArcReel to create videos
openClaw.step03Desc: Describe your creative needs, and OpenClaw will use ArcReel for project management, script generation, and video creation
